subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-07
subcodes.first_line: It is the beholding of the beauty of this perfection in the reality of His own identity. It is from the entity of God to His Own Entity.
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @creation of the world, @power of love, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
